apparel.notes: Includes fabric, trims, and thread sourcing. Sample review adds ~5 days before bulk production approval.

fabric.notes: Raw yarn or greige fabric sourcing. Lab-dip approval adds ~3 days for colored fabric orders.

cnc.notes: Tight tolerances require first-article inspection (FAI) before bulk run. Allow extra days for anodizing or surface treatment.

packaging.notes: Printing plates add 2-3 days on first order. Reorder without design change is faster.

electronics.notes: Component lead times vary significantly (ICs may be 8–16 weeks). PCBA requires functional testing per batch.

trims_accessories.notes: Custom mold tooling adds 10-15 days on first order for injection-molded components.
